title: hippomarathrum cristatum
intro: Hippomarathrum cristatum, also known as cristate horse parsley or cristate meadow parsley, is a perennial plant native to mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and menstrual cramps. Hippomarathrum cristatum is commonly prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used topically in the form of a poultice or salve to treat various skin conditions.
